chunks.title: Ephraim's Guilt and Disappearance
chunks.reason: Describes the historical guilt of Ephraim and predicts their sudden vanishing like morning cloud or chaff.

chunks.title: Yahweh's Past Care and Present Judgment
chunks.reason: God recounts His deliverance from Egypt, their forgetfulness, and the withdrawal of their kings.

chunks.title: The Inevitability of Ruin
chunks.reason: Declares that Ephraim's sin is stored up and compares their coming destruction to painful childbirth.

chunks.title: The Destruction of Samaria
chunks.reason: Predicts the drying up of Ephraim's resources and the violent fall of Samaria by the sword.
